nasb.text: When they came back to their brothers at Zorah and Eshtaol, their brothers said to them, “What do you report?”

esv.text: And when they came to their brothers at Zorah and Eshtaol, their brothers said to them, “What do you report?”

cnv.text: 他們回到瑣拉和以實陶自己的族人那裡去；族人問他們：“你們有甚麼話說？”

ccb.text: 五人回到琐拉和以实陶后，族人问他们：“你们有什么发现吗？”
